TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu qalang maku ga, Pyaway cyux maki squ llyung na Gogan, syaw nqu Pyaway ga Kiran. musa yatux cikay lga Qwilan, qsiyaq na qalang Pyaway ga Sbunaw. qalang mu Pyaway ga ini ktwa iyal blihun nqu ngasal. kwara ssquliq ga musa kbhun mzimal msyaw, blihun ngasal ga musa mpusal msyaw cikay, qalang Pyaway qani ga, pssi balay inlungan, yani balay qutux nqu blihun ngasal, tayal ru tayal ga yani balay squ mtswe qutux blihun qu ngasal. qalang Pyaway ga qutux balay squ kyoha ru kyokay, nanak qutux cyoro kyokay, aring squ bnkis myan tehuk kinbahan ga, te zmagal ray nqu kuriscyang, kwara qalang ga, si squtux skura Utux Kayal kwara. san mha squ Pyaway ga, maki squ qutux pinkyalan nha. maki qutux bnkis na qalang qani, lalu nya ga Yaway. squliq musa squ yatux na qalang ini ga hugal siki mhkangi kakay sraral. tehuk qalang ni Yaway lga mwah mhngaw qalang kwara. yaki Yaway qani ga, pngsa kwara pinbahuw nya, mi_yan nqu ngahi, sehuy, bonaw ini ga bitak, biwa... suruw nya lga wal klhun Utux Kayal qu bnkis Yaway lga, khmay balay squ qalang nqu aring yatux s'inu nha kwara pngsa ni k'aki Yaway qasa, nanu yasa syun nha lalu qalang mha Pyaway la. qalang Pyaway ga, blaq balay qu uraw ru rhiyal nya, ana nanu pinbahuw tmhyun ga blaq balay kwara, mi_yan squ qwirux, nasi, qruhaw, biwa, bitak, guquh, ngahi, nobu, sehuy, bonaw, tbana, thbu, qabang… kwara pinbahuw kinkrahu ru kinsbing balay. rgyax Pyaway ga baqun musa mqbuyang mlikuy tayal uzi. yan na musa smi mrusa baq ciriq squ bzyok qnhyun, para, yapit, mit kruma laqung uzi. sraral ga blaq nha niqun laqung qani, ana ga ini kmsyam hi nya laqung ru blaq balay ktan kinryasan nya. nanu yasa t'aring magu squ laqung qalang Pyaway qani. nanu qalang Pyaway lga s'agal naha squ kinryasan laqung syun nha syaw na blihun tuqi, kruma kmal mha Pyaway ga qalang na laqung. trang saku laqi cipuq ga tehuk 'bagan lga musa sami lmngyaq bih Gongrawan. musa m'zi qsya, qziqun sami lukus myam ru tpa sami te krahu na btunux. mtgayaw ru mhngaw sami kya, mugi sami gwagi ru yupan behuy rqyas myan, blaq balay qsliq wah! kzyay lukus sami lga msbzinah sami qalang Pyaway. m'uzyay sami lga hmkangi sami t'lwi ini ga biluk niqun sami ru mtngi sami uzi la. yani qani lga pssi sami inlungan ita qalang Pyaway qani. ana bnkis mrkyas ru lelaqi si myan pcqun kmagaw qalang Pyaway qutux byacing ga mintxal kmagaw. ru tmuya myan pphpah ru qqhuniq uzi, nanu yasa blaq balay ktan qalang Pyaway qani, yani balay nyux pkusan squ giqas na llukus. nanu yasa khmay balay kmukan mwah qalang Pyaway. baha hmswa ungat qutux squ s'syang nqu basu ru baq tnglang squ inlungan nha. qalang Pyaway ga baq sbasaw inlungan squliq. babaw nya lga. aring squ kyokay ru qalang qani nyux smungus mha musa spwah squ renki na wagi. renki na qsya. renki na behuy mwah squ mqcbaq qpzing nqu kinbleqan na Yaba Utux Kayal. aring gwagi behuy qsya' musa mwah phtuw squ renki. ya qani ga nyux myan sngusun, maha qani ga aki lmeliq lozi qu sinrxan na qalang Pyaway.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu qalaŋ maku ɣa, pjawaj ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu lljuŋ na ɣoɣan, s~ɕjaw nqu pjawaj ɣa kiran. mus~ɕa jatux ʦ~ʨikaj lɣa qwilan, qs~ɕijaq na qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa s~ɕβunaw. qalaŋ mu pjawaj ɣa ini ktwa ijal βliħun nqu ŋas~ɕal. kwara s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa kβħun mzimal ms~ɕjaw, βliħun ŋas~ɕal ɣa mus~ɕa mpus~ɕal ms~ɕjaw ʦ~ʨikaj, qalaŋ pjawaj qani ɣa, ps~ɕs~ɕi βalaj inluŋan, jani βalaj qutux nqu βliħun ŋas~ɕal, tajal ru tajal ɣa jani βalaj s~ɕqu mts~ɕwe qutux βliħun qu ŋas~ɕal. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa qutux βalaj s~ɕqu kjoħa ru kjokaj, nanak qutux ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj, ariŋ s~ɕqu βnkis~ɕ mjan teħuk kinβaħan ɣa, te zmaɣal raj nqu kuris~ɕʦ~ʨjaŋ, kwara qalaŋ ɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕqutux s~ɕkura utux kajal kwara. s~ɕan mħa s~ɕqu pjawaj ɣa, maki s~ɕqu qutux pinkjalan nħa. maki qutux βnkis~ɕ na qalaŋ qani, lalu nja ɣa jawaj. s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa s~ɕqu jatux na qalaŋ ini ɣa ħuɣal s~ɕiki mħkaŋi kakaj s~ɕraral. teħuk qalaŋ ni jawaj lɣa mwaħ mħŋaw qalaŋ kwara. jaki jawaj qani ɣa, pŋs~ɕa kwara pinβaħuw nja, miəjan nqu ŋaħi, s~ɕeħuj, βonaw ini ɣa βitak, βiwa... s~ɕuruw nja lɣa wal klħun utux kajal qu βnkis~ɕ jawaj lɣa, kħmaj βalaj s~ɕqu qalaŋ nqu ariŋ jatux s~ɕʔinu nħa kwara pŋs~ɕa ni kʔaki jawaj qas~ɕa, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕjun nħa lalu qalaŋ mħa pjawaj la. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa, βlaq βalaj qu uraw ru rħijal nja, ana nanu pinβaħuw tmħjun ɣa βlaq βalaj kwara, miəjan s~ɕqu qwirux, nas~ɕi, qruħaw, βiwa, βitak, ɣuquħ, ŋaħi, noβu, s~ɕeħuj, βonaw, tβana, tħβu, qaβaŋ* kwara pinβaħuw kinkraħu ru kins~ɕβiŋ βalaj. rɣjax pjawaj ɣa βaqun mus~ɕa mqβujaŋ mlikuj tajal uzi. jan na mus~ɕa s~ɕmi mrus~ɕa βaq ʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu βzjok qnħjun, para, japit, mit kruma laquŋ uzi. s~ɕraral ɣa βlaq nħa niqun laquŋ qani, ana ɣa ini kms~ɕjam ħi nja laquŋ ru βlaq βalaj ktan kinrjas~ɕan nja. nanu jas~ɕa tʔariŋ maɣu s~ɕqu laquŋ qalaŋ pjawaj qani. nanu qalaŋ pjawaj lɣa s~ɕʔaɣal naħa s~ɕqu kinrjas~ɕan laquŋ s~ɕjun nħa s~ɕjaw na βliħun tuqi, kruma kmal mħa pjawaj ɣa qalaŋ na laquŋ. traŋ s~ɕaku laqi ʦ~ʨipuq ɣa teħuk ʔβaɣan lɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕami lmŋjaq βiħ ɣoŋrawan. mus~ɕa mʔzi qs~ɕja, qziqun s~ɕami lukus~ɕ mjam ru tpa s~ɕami te kraħu na βtunux. mtɣajaw ru mħŋaw s~ɕami kja, muɣi s~ɕami ɣwaɣi ru jupan βeħuj rqjas~ɕ mjan, βlaq βalaj qs~ɕliq waħ! kzjaj lukus~ɕ s~ɕami lɣa ms~ɕβzinaħ s~ɕami qalaŋ pjawaj. mʔuzjaj s~ɕami lɣa ħmkaŋi s~ɕami tʔlwi ini ɣa βiluk niqun s~ɕami ru mtŋi s~ɕami uzi la. jani qani lɣa ps~ɕs~ɕi s~ɕami inluŋan ita qalaŋ pjawaj qani. ana βnkis~ɕ mrkjas~ɕ ru lelaqi s~ɕi mjan pʦ~ʨqun kmaɣaw qalaŋ pjawaj qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa mintxal kmaɣaw. ru tmuja mjan ppħpaħ ru qqħuniq uzi, nanu jas~ɕa βlaq βalaj ktan qalaŋ pjawaj qani, jani βalaj njux pkus~ɕan s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ na llukus~ɕ. nanu jas~ɕa kħmaj βalaj kmukan mwaħ qalaŋ pjawaj. βaħa ħms~ɕwa uŋat qutux s~ɕqu s~ɕʔs~ɕjaŋ nqu βas~ɕu ru βaq tŋlaŋ s~ɕqu inluŋan nħa. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa βaq s~ɕβas~ɕaw inluŋan s~ɕquliq. βaβaw nja lɣa. ariŋ s~ɕqu kjokaj ru qalaŋ qani njux s~ɕmuŋus~ɕ mħa mus~ɕa s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu renki na waɣi. renki na qs~ɕja. renki na βeħuj mwaħ s~ɕqu mqʦ~ʨβaq qpziŋ nqu kinβleqan na jaβa utux kajal. ariŋ ɣwaɣi βeħuj qs~ɕjaʔ mus~ɕa mwaħ pħtuw s~ɕqu renki. ja qani ɣa njux mjan s~ɕŋus~ɕun, maħa qani ɣa aki lmeliq lozi qu s~ɕinrxan na qalaŋ pjawaj.
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu qalang maku ga, Pyaway cyux maki squ llyung na Gogan, syaw nqu Pyaway ga Kiran. musa yatux cikay lga Qwilan, qsiyaq na qalang Pyaway ga Sbunaw. qalang mu Pyaway ga ini ktwa iyal blihun nqu ngasal. kwara ssquliq ga musa kbhun mzimal msyaw, blihun ngasal ga musa mpusal msyaw cikay, qalang Pyaway qani ga, pssi balay inlungan, yani balay qutux nqu blihun ngasal, tayal ru tayal ga yani balay squ mtswe qutux blihun qu ngasal. qalang Pyaway ga qutux balay squ kyoha ru kyokay, nanak qutux cyoro kyokay, aring squ bnkis myan tehuk kinbahan ga, te zmagal ray nqu kuriscyang, kwara qalang ga, si squtux skura Utux Kayal kwara. san mha squ Pyaway ga, maki squ qutux pinkyalan nha. maki qutux bnkis na qalang qani, lalu nya ga Yaway. squliq musa squ yatux na qalang ini ga hugal siki mhkangi kakay sraral. tehuk qalang ni Yaway lga mwah mhngaw qalang kwara. yaki Yaway qani ga, pngsa kwara pinbahuw nya, mi_yan nqu ngahi, sehuy, bonaw ini ga bitak, biwa... suruw nya lga wal klhun Utux Kayal qu bnkis Yaway lga, khmay balay squ qalang nqu aring yatux s'inu nha kwara pngsa ni k'aki Yaway qasa, nanu yasa syun nha lalu qalang mha Pyaway la. qalang Pyaway ga, blaq balay qu uraw ru rhiyal nya, ana nanu pinbahuw tmhyun ga blaq balay kwara, mi_yan squ qwirux, nasi, qruhaw, biwa, bitak, guquh, ngahi, nobu, sehuy, bonaw, tbana, thbu, qabang… kwara pinbahuw kinkrahu ru kinsbing balay. rgyax Pyaway ga baqun musa mqbuyang mlikuy tayal uzi. yan na musa smi mrusa baq ciriq squ bzyok qnhyun, para, yapit, mit kruma laqung uzi. sraral ga blaq nha niqun laqung qani, ana ga ini kmsyam hi nya laqung ru blaq balay ktan kinryasan nya. nanu yasa t'aring magu squ laqung qalang Pyaway qani. nanu qalang Pyaway lga s'agal naha squ kinryasan laqung syun nha syaw na blihun tuqi, kruma kmal mha Pyaway ga qalang na laqung. trang saku laqi cipuq ga tehuk 'bagan lga musa sami lmngyaq bih Gongrawan. musa m'zi qsya, qziqun sami lukus myam ru tpa sami te krahu na btunux. mtgayaw ru mhngaw sami kya, mugi sami gwagi ru yupan behuy rqyas myan, blaq balay qsliq wah! kzyay lukus sami lga msbzinah sami qalang Pyaway. m'uzyay sami lga hmkangi sami t'lwi ini ga biluk niqun sami ru mtngi sami uzi la. yani qani lga pssi sami inlungan ita qalang Pyaway qani. ana bnkis mrkyas ru lelaqi si myan pcqun kmagaw qalang Pyaway qutux byacing ga mintxal kmagaw. ru tmuya myan pphpah ru qqhuniq uzi, nanu yasa blaq balay ktan qalang Pyaway qani, yani balay nyux pkusan squ giqas na llukus. nanu yasa khmay balay kmukan mwah qalang Pyaway. baha hmswa ungat qutux squ s'syang nqu basu ru baq tnglang squ inlungan nha. qalang Pyaway ga baq sbasaw inlungan squliq. babaw nya lga. aring squ kyokay ru qalang qani nyux smungus mha musa spwah squ renki na wagi. renki na qsya. renki na behuy mwah squ mqcbaq qpzing nqu kinbleqan na Yaba Utux Kayal. aring gwagi behuy qsya' musa mwah phtuw squ renki. ya qani ga nyux myan sngusun, maha qani ga aki lmeliq lozi qu sinrxan na qalang Pyaway.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu qalaŋ maku ɣa, pjawaj ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu lljuŋ na ɣoɣan, s~ɕjaw nqu pjawaj ɣa kiran. mus~ɕa jatux ʦ~ʨikaj lɣa qwilan, qs~ɕijaq na qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa s~ɕβunaw. qalaŋ mu pjawaj ɣa ini ktwa ijal βliħun nqu ŋas~ɕal. kwara s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa kβħun mzimal ms~ɕjaw, βliħun ŋas~ɕal ɣa mus~ɕa mpus~ɕal ms~ɕjaw ʦ~ʨikaj, qalaŋ pjawaj qani ɣa, ps~ɕs~ɕi βalaj inluŋan, jani βalaj qutux nqu βliħun ŋas~ɕal, tajal ru tajal ɣa jani βalaj s~ɕqu mts~ɕwe qutux βliħun qu ŋas~ɕal. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa qutux βalaj s~ɕqu kjoħa ru kjokaj, nanak qutux ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj, ariŋ s~ɕqu βnkis~ɕ mjan teħuk kinβaħan ɣa, te zmaɣal raj nqu kuris~ɕʦ~ʨjaŋ, kwara qalaŋ ɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕqutux s~ɕkura utux kajal kwara. s~ɕan mħa s~ɕqu pjawaj ɣa, maki s~ɕqu qutux pinkjalan nħa. maki qutux βnkis~ɕ na qalaŋ qani, lalu nja ɣa jawaj. s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa s~ɕqu jatux na qalaŋ ini ɣa ħuɣal s~ɕiki mħkaŋi kakaj s~ɕraral. teħuk qalaŋ ni jawaj lɣa mwaħ mħŋaw qalaŋ kwara. jaki jawaj qani ɣa, pŋs~ɕa kwara pinβaħuw nja, miəjan nqu ŋaħi, s~ɕeħuj, βonaw ini ɣa βitak, βiwa... s~ɕuruw nja lɣa wal klħun utux kajal qu βnkis~ɕ jawaj lɣa, kħmaj βalaj s~ɕqu qalaŋ nqu ariŋ jatux s~ɕʔinu nħa kwara pŋs~ɕa ni kʔaki jawaj qas~ɕa, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕjun nħa lalu qalaŋ mħa pjawaj la. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa, βlaq βalaj qu uraw ru rħijal nja, ana nanu pinβaħuw tmħjun ɣa βlaq βalaj kwara, miəjan s~ɕqu qwirux, nas~ɕi, qruħaw, βiwa, βitak, ɣuquħ, ŋaħi, noβu, s~ɕeħuj, βonaw, tβana, tħβu, qaβaŋ* kwara pinβaħuw kinkraħu ru kins~ɕβiŋ βalaj. rɣjax pjawaj ɣa βaqun mus~ɕa mqβujaŋ mlikuj tajal uzi. jan na mus~ɕa s~ɕmi mrus~ɕa βaq ʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu βzjok qnħjun, para, japit, mit kruma laquŋ uzi. s~ɕraral ɣa βlaq nħa niqun laquŋ qani, ana ɣa ini kms~ɕjam ħi nja laquŋ ru βlaq βalaj ktan kinrjas~ɕan nja. nanu jas~ɕa tʔariŋ maɣu s~ɕqu laquŋ qalaŋ pjawaj qani. nanu qalaŋ pjawaj lɣa s~ɕʔaɣal naħa s~ɕqu kinrjas~ɕan laquŋ s~ɕjun nħa s~ɕjaw na βliħun tuqi, kruma kmal mħa pjawaj ɣa qalaŋ na laquŋ. traŋ s~ɕaku laqi ʦ~ʨipuq ɣa teħuk ʔβaɣan lɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕami lmŋjaq βiħ ɣoŋrawan. mus~ɕa mʔzi qs~ɕja, qziqun s~ɕami lukus~ɕ mjam ru tpa s~ɕami te kraħu na βtunux. mtɣajaw ru mħŋaw s~ɕami kja, muɣi s~ɕami ɣwaɣi ru jupan βeħuj rqjas~ɕ mjan, βlaq βalaj qs~ɕliq waħ! kzjaj lukus~ɕ s~ɕami lɣa ms~ɕβzinaħ s~ɕami qalaŋ pjawaj. mʔuzjaj s~ɕami lɣa ħmkaŋi s~ɕami tʔlwi ini ɣa βiluk niqun s~ɕami ru mtŋi s~ɕami uzi la. jani qani lɣa ps~ɕs~ɕi s~ɕami inluŋan ita qalaŋ pjawaj qani. ana βnkis~ɕ mrkjas~ɕ ru lelaqi s~ɕi mjan pʦ~ʨqun kmaɣaw qalaŋ pjawaj qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa mintxal kmaɣaw. ru tmuja mjan ppħpaħ ru qqħuniq uzi, nanu jas~ɕa βlaq βalaj ktan qalaŋ pjawaj qani, jani βalaj njux pkus~ɕan s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ na llukus~ɕ. nanu jas~ɕa kħmaj βalaj kmukan mwaħ qalaŋ pjawaj. βaħa ħms~ɕwa uŋat qutux s~ɕqu s~ɕʔs~ɕjaŋ nqu βas~ɕu ru βaq tŋlaŋ s~ɕqu inluŋan nħa. qalaŋ pjawaj ɣa βaq s~ɕβas~ɕaw inluŋan s~ɕquliq. βaβaw nja lɣa. ariŋ s~ɕqu kjokaj ru qalaŋ qani njux s~ɕmuŋus~ɕ mħa mus~ɕa s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu renki na waɣi. renki na qs~ɕja. renki na βeħuj mwaħ s~ɕqu mqʦ~ʨβaq qpziŋ nqu kinβleqan na jaβa utux kajal. ariŋ ɣwaɣi βeħuj qs~ɕjaʔ mus~ɕa mwaħ pħtuw s~ɕqu renki. ja qani ɣa njux mjan s~ɕŋus~ɕun, maħa qani ɣa aki lmeliq lozi qu s~ɕinrxan na qalaŋ pjawaj.
